title: After the Hanshin J.F.: Child Prodigy

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I... I won...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Nishino Flower's so fast! She's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: She seriously is a prodigy! Way to go, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I... I did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So please, don't worry so much.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'd rather see you smile. So... could you do that
for me, please?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, that person just—
choice_data_list: Let's go rest in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Ehehe.)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's her trainer? Now there's someone with
a sharp eye for runners!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: They were praising Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Winning sure feels nice. It was a lot of work, but
Trainer looked so happy.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(And thanks to Trainer's guidance and care, I
don't feel as tired as I did after my debut race.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I was wondering why I became race-ready so
early...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (But maybe it's because it's happening now that...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right! I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I've decided what I want my next race to
be.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to come back here again, when the cherry
blossoms are in bloom!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I want to run in the Oka Sho and take on the
Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara tour comprises three G1 races
that can only be run in one's classic year—the
Oka Sho, the Japanese Oaks, and the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's proven today that she can handle G1 races,
and her running shows a lot of promise for her
classic year. In that case...
choice_data_list: Okay! The Oka Sho it is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to take on the Triple Tiara by
running in its first race—the Oka Sho! However,
there's something I want to know.
choice_data_list: Was this your plan from the start?
Was this your plan from the start?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many Umamusume who run in the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies go on to run in the Triple Tiara
tour. It's only natural to want to challenge
higher-level races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, deciding to run the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies was a bold choice for her. Maybe
I'm only thinking about this because she's never
voiced what her dream is, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I'll tell you after the Oka Sho!
